hero.imageAlt: Talé resort — panoramic Red Sea view
hero.subheading: Luxury is no longer just a stay. It's a place you return to, year after year.

heroBookingNote.line2: Reservation requests reopen on schedule — memberships and presentations stay open.

about.label: About Talé
about.heading: A destination that
about.body: <brand>TALÉ</brand> was created to redefine the way people experience vacations, introducing a concept built on consistency, comfort, and a true sense of belonging. Designed for those who seek more than just a temporary stay, offering a destination that naturally becomes part of their yearly lifestyle.
about.closing: Your escape should always be waiting for you.

juraSokhna.label: Jura Sokhna
juraSokhna.heading: Coastal vision,
juraSokhna.body: <brand>Talé Hotel</brand> manages <project>Jura Sokhna</project> — a signature development on the Red Sea, <developer>powered by New Jersey Developments</developer>.

services.label: Talé as a 5-Star Hotel
services.heading: Hospitality,
services.intro: Three pillars — experience, services, and wellness — thoughtfully arranged so every detail of your stay is already taken care of.

experience.title: 5-star hospitality
items: Seamless operations from arrival to departure

suites.label: Suites
suites.title: Suites
suites.description: Intimate retreats crafted for couples and solo travelers. Serene interiors, curated furnishings, and uninterrupted Red Sea light.

duplex.label: Duplex
duplex.title: Duplexes
duplex.description: Two-level sanctuaries for larger parties. Quiet private floors above open living, dining, and an elevated sun deck.

apartment.label: Hotel Apartment
apartment.title: Hotel Apartments
apartment.description: Residence-style living with full hotel service — a home by the Red Sea that is effortlessly ready for every return.

experience.label: The Talé Experience
experience.heading: Effortless by
experience.body1: <brand>TALÉ</brand> offers an effortless, ready-to-use experience with every visit, ensuring the same high level of quality year after year.
experience.body2: It combines complete privacy with full hotel service, all thoughtfully designed to create the perfect environment for relaxation and escape.

pricing.label: Pricing & Payment Plan
pricing.planDescription: A transparent plan designed for effortless commitment. No surprises — just a clear path to your annual escape.
pricing.limitedNotice: Memberships are limited. Each private presentation is scheduled personally by our membership director.

lead.label: Lead Capture
lead.heading: Book your private
lead.intro: Leave your details below and our team will reach out within 24 hours to arrange a personal walkthrough.
lead.name: Full Name
lead.privacy: We respect your privacy. Your details are never shared.
lead.successBody: Thank you. Our membership director will contact you within 24 hours to schedule your private presentation.

errors.generic: Could not send your request. Please try again.
errors.network: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.

inventory.label: Live Inventory
inventory.heading: Reserve a
inventory.intro: While your membership is being prepared, explore our live suites available for shorter stays and weekend escapes.
inventory.descriptionDefault: Designed as a seamless extension of the coastal lifestyle, bridging curated personal service with purely uninterrupted views of the Red Sea.

property.heroTagline: Talé · Galala City — curated coastal living on the Red Sea.
property.descriptionDefault: Indulge in an uninterrupted coastal escape tailored to your stay — panoramic views, refined interiors, and the calm rhythm of the Red Sea.
property.amenitiesEmpty: Amenities will appear here once configured. Standard Talé comforts apply across all suites.
property.heldDatesIntro: The nights below are already reserved. Choose open dates for your stay.
property.notOpen: This suite is not open for booking yet. Browse other sanctuaries or check back later.
property.globallyPaused: Online reservation requests are paused. Booking opens on {date}.
property.signedInNotice: You are signed in. After approval, complete payment from your <link>guest portal</link>.
property.signInNotice: <link>Sign in to the guest portal</link> to submit a reservation request.
property.datesUnavailable: Those dates are not available. Please choose another range.
property.notFound: This suite could not be found.
property.requestSuccess: Request received. After an administrator approves it, complete payment from your guest portal.
property.networkError: Request failed. Check your connection and try again.

footer.description: The pinnacle of coastal hospitality. Discover a pristine extension of the Red Sea lifestyle, where uninterrupted panoramic views meet curated personal service at every physical corner.
footer.newsletterIntro: Subscribe for strictly exclusive access to peak-season suite availability prior to global drops.
footer.copyright: © {year} Talé Hotel & Resorts. All Rights Reserved. Engineered By David Zakaria.

seo.homeTitle: Talé Hotel | Luxury Coastal Living & 10-Year Memberships in Galala City
seo.homeDescription: Talé Hotel introduces a tailored hospitality experience at the heart of Galala City. A seamless extension of the coastal lifestyle, bringing together hotel comfort, curated service, and uninterrupted views of the Red Sea — with 10-year private memberships for those who wish to return, year after year.
seo.propertyTitleFallback: Suite at Talé Hotel | Galala City
seo.propertyDescriptionFallback: A curated coastal sanctuary at Talé Hotel, Galala City. Panoramic Red Sea views, refined interiors, and effortless 5-star service.

hotel.description: Talé Hotel — luxury coastal living on the Red Sea in Galala City, Egypt. Fully serviced hotel apartments, suites, and duplexes with 10-year private memberships.
